perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman with pigtails smiling widely and waving her hands toward the camera in an outdoor, crowded setting. (2) The scene cuts to a second woman with short hair holding up a colorful ribbon/medal for a '7K' event, smiling brightly. (3) A third woman with long dark hair appears, holding the same medal and speaking enthusiastically. (4) A fourth woman in a yellow skirt and tan hoodie is shown from a medium shot, cheering and then holding the medal to her face, followed by a close-up of her giving two thumbs up. (5) The first woman returns, holding a bundle of medals and clapping her hands excitedly. (6) The final scene shows a man in a colorful floral shirt walking up to a woman in a striped shirt; they shake hands vigorously while both smile and laugh toward the camera, posing for a photo at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female voices are heard cheering and saying 'Gongxi ni' (Congratulations) over upbeat, fast-tempo background music. (2) The music continues as different female voices express excitement and praise. (3) A loud, energetic male voice enters, speaking rapidly in Mandarin with a very high-pitched and enthusiastic tone, praising the event. (4) Sounds of wind, crowd chatter, and the upbeat BGM blend together throughout the recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '7K' visible on the medals and ribbons held by participants. (2) Functional Text: Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, translating the energetic speech of the man at the end. (3) Decorative Text: 'STAFF' is visible on a blue vest worn by a person in the background.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Event participants showing off medals -> Montage of celebration -> Main personality greeting the organizer/staff.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 5 main featured individuals (4 women, 1 man) and at least 10 background participants/passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a colorful floral pattern short-sleeve shirt and several young women wearing casual outdoor clothing like hoodies and sports skirts, all wearing '7K' medals.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor event area with white tents, crowd barriers, a Ferris wheel in the distance, and many people walking around.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Linear: Reaction shots of various participants celebrating success -> Key influencer interacting with staff/organizer.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the joyous atmosphere and successful completion of a '7K' running or walking event hosted or attended by a popular influencer. The video aims to convey a sense of accomplishment, community, and high energy to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Participants are prominently displaying medals and ribbons from a specific '7K' event, and the main personality is seen praising the event's organization.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy, fast-paced editing, and signature high-pitched enthusiastic greeting from the male influencer.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video features a well-known Taiwanese YouTuber (Cai A-ga/YGA) and focuses on the positive vibes of a local community event.
